title: Sentry provider config
description: Configuration shape for a Sentry error-tracking integration. Validated by MonitoringProviderConfigObserver on create + update.

sentry_dsn.description: Sentry DSN. Format: https://<key>@<host>/<project_id>. Extracted at dispatch time to build the envelope endpoint. Encrypted at rest.

environment.description: Optional environment tag (production, staging, dev). Included in every event to enable environment-scoped filtering in Sentry.

release.description: Optional release identifier (git sha, semver tag). Sentry uses this for release-health tracking.

sample_rate.description: Sample rate for error events. 1.0 = every event; 0.1 = 10% sampled. Defaults to 1.0 (no sampling).

traces_sample_rate.description: Sample rate for performance/tracing events. Defaults to 0 (disabled) — monitoring events are already high-signal + don't need tracing.

attach_signal_context_as_tags.description: true = alert.signal_context jsonb keys become Sentry event tags for filtering. false = signal_context serialized into event body only.
